name: Tuna & Noodle Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the pouch of sweet peas and place it in a microwave-safe dish.
Cook at full power for 5 minutes.
2. Cook the noodles in water according to package instructions in a separate
microwave-safe bowl. This typically takes 5-6 minutes or until done.
Drain well before adding to the dish.
3. In a large, microwave-safe casserole dish, combine the cooked sweet peas,
noodles, cheese sauce packet, drained tuna, mustard, and chopped pimiento.
Stir to combine.
4. Cover the dish with a microwave-safe lid or plate.
Heat at full power for 3-4 minutes or until heated through.
Serves: 5-6
Microwave cooking time: 13-15 minutes
Stovetop cooking time (if using conventional oven): 35-40 minutes
